svg.aria-label: Weekly security digest 2026-04-13: CPUID supply-chain breach distributes STX RAT via trojanized CPU-Z and HWMonitor tools, Marimo critical pre-auth RCE actively exploited with credential theft, Adobe Acrobat zero-day CVE-2026-34621 patched, Google Pixel 10 adopts Rust in baseband firmware for memory safety
svg.title: 2026-04-13 digest: CPUID STX RAT (Medium), Marimo RCE (Critical), Adobe CVE-2026-34621 zero-day (Critical)

g.text: CPUID Breach: STX RAT via CPU-Z
24-hr window : Apr 9 15:00 UTC - Apr 10 10:00 UTC : The Hacker News
Supply chain attack via trusted hardware utility · STX RAT enables full remote control
No auth required — full remote code exec
Credential theft confirmed : patch immediately : BleepingComputer
Pre-auth HTTP vector triggers arbitrary code execution — credentials exfiltrated
Actively exploited Reader zero-day — patch deployed
CVE-2026-34621 : Adobe Acrobat Reader : The Hacker News
Rust in Google Pixel 10 baseband firmware — memory safety milestone
